text: My senses are overwhelmed by the intersection of technology and human intention here. In the first scene, I feel like an observer, separated by glass from collective engagement—a sense of anticipation and slight detachment. In the second, I’m enveloped by ideas and innovation, awash in the glow of screens and text. It’s a space that provokes curiosity and self-reflection, inviting me to question my place in a world shaped by research and development. I feel both inspired and unsettled by the pace of progress surrounding me.
